title: Buttery Silky Show-off Croatian Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A raw-friendly dish showcasing the creamy texture and nutty flavor of pistachios in a buttery and silky sauce over tender vegetables, designed to impress with its sophisticated blend.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions, minced garlic, and chopped bell peppers. Cook until softened.
Pour in chicken broth or water, reduce heat to medium, add pistachio paste if using, stir well and let simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream, butter, and salt/pepper to taste. Simmer for another minute.
Add broccoli florets, gently toss until heated through. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with a garnish of additional chopped pistachios on top.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
